reviews.comment:
Siempre se demora en la carga, mucha congestión de automóviles. No inflan cubiertas desde los surtidores y solo tienen un compresor

(Translated by Google)
There are always long delays while refueling, and heavy traffic. They don't inflate tires at the pumps and only have one compressor.

reviews.comment:
En general siempre hay fila para cargar nafta. Si sos socio podes hacer trámites de dni o licencia de conducir y estacionar el auto gratis. El lavadero es bueno pero puede ser lento, recomiendo ir al de Godoy Cruz.

(Translated by Google)
There's usually a line to get gas. If you're a member, you can get your ID or driver's license processed and park for free. The car wash is good but can be slow; I recommend going to the one in Godoy Cruz.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3cUotR213RRAB
